edition.title: Rost-AI gratis for drive-thru, HeyGen-deadline idag

stories.headline: Quail Digital och Audivi ger bort rost-AI-hardvara gratis
claims: Quail Digital and Audivi launched free voice AI hardware platform for QSR
Quail provides audio hardware, Audivi provides AI ordering software
Drive-thru orders = 70%+ of sales at many QSR chains
Quail present in 32 countries
predictions: Free hardware models will become standard for voice AI market entry
actions: Monitor pricing pressure effects on in-dining voice AI expectations

delta.note: Confirms voice AI market crowding reported in 20260325-01. Hardware now given away free.

stories.headline: Rost-AI blir mission-critical for fristaende restauranger
claims: 95%+ order accuracy from leading voice AI platforms
26% increase in phone order revenue
10,000+ locations running voice AI globally
40% of phone calls unanswered during peak hours
$30K/year lost per restaurant from unanswered calls
predictions: Voice AI will become standard infrastructure for independent restaurants within 18 months
actions: Use $30K/year lost metric in Flava sales materials to illustrate cost of inaction

stories.headline: 51% av restaurangkedjor investerar i AI, men ROI slaper
claims: 51% of restaurant chains actively investing in AI
22% planning to start, 10% targeting next year
Most frequent: marketing/personalization (53%), predictive analytics (40%), voice ordering (39%)
62% cite data visibility across locations as top challenge
Few have seen AI really move the needle yet
predictions: First mover with hard ROI proof from AI pilots will capture disproportionate market attention
actions: Build measurable results (average check, upsell rate) from Flava pilots

delta.note: Confirms adoption-not-features barrier from 20260325-01. 51% investing but ROI unproven.

stories.headline: Nordiska restauranglistan 2026: 12 basta nyoppningarna
claims: The Nordic Nomad annual hot list covers Denmark, Finland, Iceland, Norway, Sweden
Emberlin (Frantzen Group, Stockholm) featured
La Girafe (Pontus Frithiof, Uppsala) featured
actions: Approach Emberlin and La Girafe as potential Flava pilot partners

stories.headline: Svenska hotellbranschen konsoliderar tillvaxten 2026
claims: Highest guest nights in a decade summer 2025, +5.6% YoY
Occupancy rate 72%
Scandic Go opening in Gothenburg (176 rooms) and Umea (100 rooms)
Interest rate easing expected H2 2026
predictions: Hotel restaurant dining will grow as hotel occupancy increases
actions: Evaluate Scandic Go as potential hotel-restaurant pilot segment

stories.headline: Deloitte: AI i restauranger, men operativa gap kvarstar
claims: Gap between order processing and food preparation fragments guest experience
Without unified data foundations, AI is just another disconnected tool
predictions: Operators who unify order, kitchen, and guest data will see highest AI ROI
actions: Position Flava's Caspeco POS integration as the unified data foundation Deloitte describes

stories.headline: HeyGen Interactive Avatar stangs idag, 31 mars
claims: Migration deadline confirmed: March 31, 2026
90-day grace period ending
Migration guide and FAQ at docs.liveavatar.com
Includes avatars, voices, knowledge bases (renamed contexts)
30-day temporary LiveAvatar subscription for migrating users
predictions: Post-migration, LiveAvatar SDK will become the standard for real-time avatar integration
actions: URGENT: Complete Flava HeyGen-to-LiveAvatar migration today if not done

delta.note: Follow-up from 20260325-01 where deadline was 6 days away. Now it is today.

stories.headline: FoodNavigator: Sa vinner foodtech-startups finansiering 2026
claims: Investors want real supply-chain problems solved
Clean cap tables preferred
Tight market for foodtech funding
Focus shifted from growth-at-all-cost to unit economics
predictions: Foodtech funding will remain tight through 2026, favoring proven unit economics
actions: Emphasize measurable unit economics from pilots in Flava investment materials

stories.headline: Toast nar $4,96 miljarder i arsintakt, forsta GAAP-vinsten
claims: Toast annual revenue $4.96B (2024)
First GAAP profitability: $19M net income
$373M adjusted EBITDA
$900M total funding across 7 rounds
actions: Reference Toast profitability trajectory when discussing Caspeco partnership opportunity

stories.headline: McKinsey: Personalisering okar retention 20-30%, snittnota 10-15%
claims: Effective personalization: +20-30% customer retention
+10-15% average order value
AI-driven menu design analyzing ordering patterns, dietary preferences, behavioral trends
predictions: Personalization ROI data will drive accelerated investment in taste profiling
actions: Use McKinsey 10-15% average check increase as anchor metric in Flava pitch deck

stories.headline: AI-verktyg for personaliserade menyer 2026: 6 plattformar jamforda
claims: Otter, Craver, Malou.io among platforms compared
Focus: menu optimization, dynamic pricing, dietary personalization
None combine voice + avatar + taste profiling
predictions: A platform combining voice, avatar, and taste profiling will emerge as category leader
actions: Use competitive comparison to validate Flava differentiation in investor presentations

arcs.name: Restaurant AI ROI Gap
data_points: 51% investing but few see it move the needle (20260330-01)
62% cite data visibility as top challenge (20260330-01)
Deloitte: operational gap fragments guest experience (20260330-01)

arcs.name: Personalization ROI Validation
data_points: No platform combines voice + avatar + taste profiling (20260330-01)

arcs.name: Swedish Premium Dining Expansion
data_points: Hotel guest nights at decade high (20260330-01)
Scandic Go expanding in Gothenburg and Umea (20260330-01)
